notes: Merge scope is the disabled internal provisioning foundation only. PREVIEW_ANALYTICS_ENABLED is absent from shipped environment templates, workflows, and config, so no preview analytics behavior is enabled by this PR. Renderer injection, the no-PII/cookieless audit, the privacy-policy decision, and a live preview observation remain mandatory activation preconditions. They are not passed or waived here.

items.title: No behavioral surface — verified by Layer 1 tests
items.precondition: PREVIEW_ANALYTICS_ENABLED remains absent or any value other than the exact string true.
items.expected: The disabled foundation performs no project read, provider call, or persistence until an operator explicitly enables it after the separate renderer and privacy checks.
items.evidence: At the exact local head before commit: focused #158 safety + #169 Rybbit service/endpoint tests passed 43/43 across 3 files; full backend suite passed 1,241/1,241 across 68 files; npx tsc --noEmit exited 0; strict conventions exited 0 with 0 clear structural violations; ESLint exited 0 with 0 errors (2,382 pre-existing warnings); dependency-cruiser exited 0 with 0 errors (38 advisory warnings). Source/config search confirms PREVIEW_ANALYTICS_ENABLED is not set by any shipped environment template, workflow, or config.
items.notes: Layer 1 proves the fail-closed gate, typed 404/500/502 failures, and atomic rollback. This N/A item does not approve activation and grants no privacy waiver.
